title: Cite coverage report formatter + i18n (en/zh-CN) — bilingual metric labels, dismissed reason enum, per-client split
description: Replace TASK-05's minimal report print with a rich bilingual formatter. zh-CN locale: 中文 metric names per locked spec ('Edit 触达数 / 合格 cite / recalled 但未验证 / 应查没查 / 总回合数'). en locale: parallel English. Render section via writeIssueSection. Per-client split shown when --client=all and per_client has entries. Dismissed reason histogram shown as bullet list. --json mode emits structured CiteCoverageReport unchanged. Header includes marker_ts ISO + since_ts ISO + warning if marker_emitted_now (means 'cite policy just activated; no historical data yet').

files.target: new renderCiteCoverageReport function + invocation from cite-coverage early-return branch
files.change: Add `renderCiteCoverageReport(report: CiteCoverageReport, jsonMode: boolean): string | void`. If jsonMode → console.log(JSON.stringify(report, null, 2)); return. Else: build text using writeIssueSection-style formatter. Header line: '## Cite coverage (since {since_ts ISO} via marker {marker_ts ISO})'. If marker_emitted_now: prepend warning line 'Cite policy activated on this run; no historical data yet.' Metrics block: 5 lines with i18n labels + numeric values (Edit 触达数: N / 合格 cite: N (X% of turns) / recalled 但未验证: N / 应查没查: N / 总回合数: N). If per_client present + has >1 entry: '### Per-client' subsection iterating clients. If dismissed_reason_histogram non-empty: '### Dismissed reasons' subsection bullet list. Replace TASK-05 minimal print with call to this formatter.

Add: `doctor.section.cite-coverage = 'Cite coverage:'`, `doctor.cite.header = 'Since {since} via marker {marker}'`, `doctor.cite.warning.justActivated = 'Cite policy activated on this run; no historical data yet.'`, `doctor.cite.metric.editsTouched = 'Edits touched'`, `doctor.cite.metric.qualifyingCites = 'Qualifying cites'`, `doctor.cite.metric.recalledUnverified = 'Recalled but not verified'`, `doctor.cite.metric.expectedButMissed = 'Expected cite missing'`, `doctor.cite.metric.totalTurns = 'Total turns'`, `doctor.cite.section.perClient = 'Per-client'`, `doctor.cite.section.dismissedReasons = 'Dismissed reasons'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.scope-mismatch = 'Scope mismatch'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.outdated = 'Outdated'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.not-applicable = 'Not applicable'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.other = 'Other'`, `doctor.cite.status.skipped = 'Cite policy not yet activated for this workspace.'`

Add Chinese mirrors using LOCKED spec metric names: `doctor.section.cite-coverage = 'Cite 覆盖率:'`, `doctor.cite.metric.editsTouched = 'Edit 触达数'`, `doctor.cite.metric.qualifyingCites = '合格 cite'`, `doctor.cite.metric.recalledUnverified = 'recalled 但未验证'`, `doctor.cite.metric.expectedButMissed = '应查没查'`, `doctor.cite.metric.totalTurns = '总回合数'`, `doctor.cite.section.perClient = '按客户端拆分'`, `doctor.cite.section.dismissedReasons = '驳回原因分布'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.scope-mismatch = '范围不符'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.outdated = '已过期'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.not-applicable = '不适用'`, `doctor.cite.dismissed.other = '其他'`, plus header/warning/status keys mirroring en.

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts L249-L282 (renderHumanReport + writeIssueSection) to confirm formatter pattern.
Define renderCiteCoverageReport(report, jsonMode) following writeIssueSection style.
Handle status:'skipped' branch — print doctor.cite.status.skipped + return early.
Iterate report.metrics — output 5 lines with i18n labels.
If report.per_client present + count(keys) > 1 — render per-client subsection.
If report.dismissed_reason_histogram present + non-empty — render bullet list with i18n reason labels.
Update cite-coverage early-return in run() dispatcher to call this formatter instead of stub print.
Add ~15 i18n keys to en.ts + zh-CN.ts symmetrically (per locked Chinese metric names).
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test i18n` (if exists) to confirm key symmetry.
Smoke test: `fab doctor --cite-coverage --json` returns JSON; without --json prints formatted report with i18n labels respecting LANG / FAB_LOCALE.

reference.examples: Existing doctor.section.fixable / .manual / .warnings + writeIssueSection invocations show the symmetric pattern.

rationale.chosen_approach: Single formatter function with json/human branches; i18n keys carry locked Chinese metric names so zh-CN locale renders authentically. en mirrors structure for international users.
alternatives_considered: Hardcode 中文 labels (rejected: violates i18n contract from rc.16)
Output table format via 3rd-party renderer (rejected: adds dependency; writeIssueSection bullets are fine)
Skip per-client breakdown to reduce clutter (rejected: locked spec includes per-client)
rationale.tradeoffs: 15 new i18n keys = noticeable locale file growth. Mitigated: keys are grouped under doctor.cite.* namespace; easy to find.

manual_checks: Run `fab doctor --cite-coverage` with LANG=en → English labels render
Run with LANG=zh-CN → 中文 labels including 'Edit 触达数 / 合格 cite / 应查没查' render verbatim per spec
Run with --json → unchanged structured output (no formatting applied)
Run with empty events (marker just activated) → warning line + zero metrics shown
success_metrics: en.ts + zh-CN.ts both contain all ~15 new doctor.cite.* keys (key symmetry check)
Formatter respects --json (no human formatting applied when --json)
marker_emitted_now warning renders on first invocation
unit: doctor.test renderCiteCoverageReport zh-CN-locale labels (assert literal '应查没查' present)
integration: CLI smoke: `LANG=zh-CN fab doctor --cite-coverage` contains '合格 cite'

criteria: renderCiteCoverageReport function defined and invoked from cite-coverage CLI branch
--json mode unchanged from TASK-06: emits structured CiteCoverageReport
Default mode renders bilingual labels via i18n (en/zh-CN both populated)
zh-CN labels match locked spec verbatim: 'Edit 触达数', '合格 cite', 'recalled 但未验证', '应查没查', '总回合数'
Per-client subsection rendered when count(per_client keys) > 1
Dismissed reasons subsection rendered when histogram non-empty, with 4 enum labels translated
marker_emitted_now warning prepended on first invocation
status:'skipped' branch prints status message and exits 0
en.ts + zh-CN.ts symmetric in doctor.cite.* namespace (all keys present in both)
Commit msg: `feat(rc20): cite coverage report formatter + i18n (TASK-07)`
